channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: ME's Custom Mod Downloader
item.description: Servers distribute their own custom mods straight to joining clients, consent-gated, hash-verified.

item.title: Roleplay Character Creator
item.description: Classic choose-your-own-adventure style character creator for Vintage Story. Server authored!

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Skaven/Rat Player Model
item.description: Adds a Skaven/Rat player model to the game it uses Player Model Lib by Maltiez!

item.title: Regalia
item.description: Fancy clothing items for all seraphs, craftable by skilled tailors

item.title: Animalica - Body Tools & Classes
item.description: Adds wearable claws, fangs, body tools, and animal classes for Fox, Wolf, and Hyena for now

item.title: Fast Travel NPC
item.description: Allows players to fast travel in the world by paying rusty gears.

item.title: Soup Man
item.description: Summon Soup Man: keep a full pot nearby, or endure his desperate cries for soup.

item.title: FuelRework
item.description: Increases the burn time of most fuels.

item.title: Easy Building
item.description: A simple mod where you get a bit more blocks and items from crafting!

item.title: Olivine Fraud
item.description: Get easy olivine with this one simple trick!

item.title: Dead
item.description: Leaves a lootable corpse of the player (with their exact skin and worn gear) at the death spot

item.title: Footprints
item.description: Animals and Players leave footprints when moving.

item.title: Blood Trail
item.description: Animals leave blood trails when wounded by a player.

item.title: Logic Blocks
item.description: This mod provides blocks for logic and interactions with gates.

item.title: Dame Elswyth’s Summons
item.description: Find and summon lost pets. Fixes PetAI fire avoidance AI task for tamed pets.

item.title: Holdfast
item.description: Found a town. Hire workers. Watch it grow one building at a time.

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: Realistic Water
item.description: Makes water spread and flow more realistically, so that you can build aqueducts, dams, canals etc

item.title: TitaniumTools
item.description: Adds titanium tools (pickaxe, axe, shovel, etc.)

item.title: Russification For Mods
item.description: Russian Translation Pack — a collection of Russian localizations for various Vintage Story mods.

item.title: Galeret
item.description: A race of cat people based on kahjit

item.title: Deciduous Trees
item.description: Trees slowly shed their leaves based on temperature. Vanilla and Eco Machina compatible.

item.title: Oils! Resoaped Standalone
item.description: A content mod that adds plant oils & some alternative recipes, e.g. treating hides and quicklime.

item.title: StirlingMotor
item.description: Adds a Stirling engine (coal energy)

item.title: The Hunter
item.description: Adds animal tracking clues, bleeding, droppings, wounded movement, and carcass carrying.

item.title: RackEmUp
item.description: Blocks carried using the CarryOn Mod can be put into and taken out of the Mold Rack

item.title: Stability Above
item.description: Removes unstable areas above sea level.

item.title: Vanilla armory
item.description: Implements unused vanilla weapons and some armor in vanilla style

item.title: Acorns for 1.22.5+
item.description: Unofficial community update for 1.22.5+
